conversation.content: Let's have an etiquette class. Today we will learn the polite rule in the world of Azeroth.
My notebook is ready. Let's begin.
In this world, there is a standard polite greeting rule: when a student greets a teacher, he or she should cheer first and then bow.
This rule is the foundation for our future study of more etiquette norms in the world of Azeroth.
